2604.27713.title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
2604.27713.paper_summary: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.
2604.27713.paper_summary_zh: AI 特徵帶來的風險隨著其迅速整合進軟體應用程式而增加。為此，已提出安全和可靠的 AI 相關法規和標準。在本文中，我們提出了一個代理框架，該框架從 AI 政策文件中構建知識圖譜 (KGs)，並檢索政策相關資訊以回答問題。我們在兩個本體架構下從三個與 AI 風險相關的政策中建立 KGs，然後在 42 個政策問答任務上評估五個 LLM，這些任務涵蓋六種推理類型，從實體查詢到跨政策推斷，使用啟發式評分和 LLM 作為評判者。KG 增強提高了所有五個模型的分數，而一個開放的、由 LLM 發現的架構與正式本體相匹配或超過。
2604.27713.author: Wilder Baldwin et.al.
